description_long: This is a well-worn claw hammer featuring a robust, metallic head with a pronounced curved claw on one side and a flat striking face on the other. The head displays significant rust and patina, indicating extensive use and exposure to the elements. The handle is straight and appears to be wrapped or coated with a textured, dark material, likely rubber or a synthetic grip, providing enhanced hold and comfort. The transition between the head and handle is reinforced, suggesting durability for heavy-duty tasks. The overall proportions are typical for a standard hammer, with the head being compact and the handle long enough for effective leverage. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, emphasizing its utilitarian design.
description: A heavily used claw hammer with a rusted metal head and a textured, dark grip handle, designed for durability and practical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hammer, highlighting the curved claw and flat striking face, as well as the textured handle.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow width of the hammer head and the cylindrical handle, with the striking face visible at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the pronounced curve of the claw and the length of the handle, mirroring view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the split claw in detail and the alignment of the handle, with the grip texture visible along the length.
attribute_handle_type: Straight handle with a dark, textured rubberized grip for enhanced hold and comfort.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a curved, split claw on the other for nail removal.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Significant rust, patina, and surface wear visible on the metal head; handle appears intact but well-used.
